event.description: {CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be equal to {2}.}{{code{queue_cnt > 1U}}}{{code{queue_cnt}}}{9}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be between {2} and {3}.}{{code{idx < 2U}}}{{code{idx}}}{0}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking true branch. Now the value of {1} is equal to {2}.}{{code{idx < 2U}}}{{code{idx}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be between {2} and {3}.}{{code{idx < 2U}}}{{code{idx}}}{0}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking true branch. Now the value of {1} is equal to {2}.}{{code{idx < 2U}}}{{code{idx}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be between {2} and {3}.}{{code{copy < 16UL}}}{{code{copy}}}{0}{15}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking true branch. Now the value of {1} is between {2} and {3}.}{{code{copy < 16UL}}}{{code{copy}}}{2}{15}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking true branch. Now the value of {1} is equal to {2}.}{{code{copy < 16UL}}}{{code{copy}}}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is between {2} and {3}.}{{code{copy >= 16UL}}}{{code{copy}}}{2}{15}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is equal to {2}.}{{code{copy >= 16UL}}}{{code{copy}}}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is equal to {2}.}{{code{copy >= 16UL}}}{{code{copy}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Incrementing {0}.}{{code{copy}}}}{t{ The value of {0} is now between {1} and {2} (inclusive).}{{code{copy}}}{3}{16}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Execution cannot reach the expression {0} inside this statement: {1}.}{{code{4}}}{{code{a_fip_read_param[channel].s...}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} cannot be {code{NULL}}.}{{code{NULL != pSmbsTx}}}{{code{pSmbsTx}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is not {code{NULL}}.}{{code{NULL == pSmbsTx}}}{{code{pSmbsTx}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be at least {2}.}{{code{qsize > 65535}}}{{code{qsize}}}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} cannot be equal to {2}.}{{code{qsize > 65535}}}{{code{qsize}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is at least {2}.}{{code{qsize == 0}}}{{code{qsize}}}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} cannot be equal to {2}.}{{code{qsize == 0}}}{{code{qsize}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be at least {2}.}{{code{qsize > 65535}}}{{code{qsize}}}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} cannot be equal to {2}.}{{code{qsize > 65535}}}{{code{qsize}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is at least {2}.}{{code{qsize == 0}}}{{code{qsize}}}{1}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} cannot be equal to {2}.}{{code{qsize == 0}}}{{code{qsize}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be equal to {2}.}{{code{0UL == message_assembly_status}}}{{code{message_assembly_status}}}{0}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} must be equal to {2}.}{{code{sqz_status == 2}}}{{code{sqz_status}}}{2}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is equal to {2}.}{{code{sqz_status == 0}}}{{code{sqz_status}}}{2}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} cannot be {code{NULL}}.}{{code{NULL == p_smbs_rx}}}{{code{p_smbs_rx}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is not {code{NULL}}.}{{code{NULL == p_smbs_rx}}}{{code{p_smbs_rx}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{At condition {0}, the value of {1} cannot be {code{NULL}}.}{{code{NULL != p_smbs_tx}}}{{code{p_smbs_tx}}}}}}
{CovLStrv2{{t{Condition {0}, taking false branch. Now the value of {1} is not {code{NULL}}.}{{code{NULL == p_smbs_tx}}}{{code{p_smbs_tx}}}}}}
